title: EDEN wire — integrate request
description: Request body for POST /v0/experiments/{E}/trials/{T}/integrate. Same-value idempotent per 07-wire-protocol.md §5; preserves 06-integrator.md §3.4 atomicity across the process boundary.

trial_commit_sha.description: The canonical-lineage SHA the integrator wrote. 40-hex SHA-1 or 64-hex SHA-256.
